statement: In every magma, Equation 2993 (`x = ((y * (z * y)) * x) * w`) implies Equation 1941 (`x = (y * (y * z)) * (x * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0692
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z y)) x) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y z)) (op x x))
